description.value:
At level 3, you become a living nightmare, a terror lurking in the darkness that preys upon the weak.
Whenever you score a critical hit, the target gains 1 rank of Hopeless, and every creature within 30 feet must make a Wisdom saving throw against your highest DC. On a failure, they also gain 1 rank of Hopeless.
Creatures immune to fear are also immune to Hopeless. Creatures with resistance to fear can only have half the normal maximum ranks of Hopeless. The standard maximum ranks a creature can accumulate is 10.

  • Each rank of hopeless increase your weapon, natural and unarmed attacks by 1 and you deal an extra 1d6 per rank damage(does not apply to jutsu that uses your unarmed, weapon or natural weapons).
  • Each 2 ranks of hopeless increases your jutsu attack by 1 and add an extra 1d6 damage to it.
  • Each 2 ranks of hopeless increases your jutsu DC by 1 and add an extra 1d6 damage to it.

A creature loses all ranks of Hopeless after spending 10 minutes outside of combat or if you are no longer perceived as a threat.
Additionally, if a creature scores a critical hit on you, they immediately lose 1 rank of Hopeless.
In case of multi hit techniques, jutsus or similar you can only apply 1 rank per casting or usage of those techniques/jutsus.
You can only apply the extra damage from the hopeless ranks once per round per creature.
